text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first day of the year sets the tone for what
follows, so Mejiro Ryan and I visit the shrine
together to start off right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer. I'm gonna pray with all I've got! It's
my senior year, and hustle is muscle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, since I'm gonna be a senior, I thought it was
a good time to get hyped up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I took on the Arima Kinen at the end of last
year...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It felt like my senior year would be this huge
ocean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I don't stay strong, the current will hold me
back. But I know what to do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The first shrine visit of the year is really
important! I need to set a clear goal for myself
here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Ryan's becoming more resolute as
she heads into the new year with great ambition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There are lots of ways to set firm goals... And I
wanna do something about my personal life too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What I'm saying is... don't be afraid to be strict
with me! If I'm gonna accomplish my goals, then
my heart needs training too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A strict goal? In that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
D-do I really have to go that far right from the
start?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Romance, my number one weakness...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then my first challenge for the new year is
to watch a romantic movie to the end without
closing my eyes in embarrassment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, we end up going to the movie
theater.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(I-it's finally beginning... Oh my gosh... I'm so
nervous! ♪)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(Oh no, I can't keep watching... I'll just close my
eyes for a little bit...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I need to tell you something. Listen... I really like
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's race until that furlong marker! Running
clockwise is your specialty after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... ♪ Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's dozed off with her mouth wide open... Well,
some sleep should reenergize her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: My deepest desire? ...You're right, I really don't have a proper goal to work for right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm done with the Classics, and I even raced
against McQueen, so I need something to move
on to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Trainer, could you give me the day to
think about this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That evening...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer... I just can't decide.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's so much to choose from. There are a lot
of important races, and then there's McQueen
and Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Can we put if off until later? Right now, I can't
help but want to go after all of them.
choice_data_list:
Going for everything will be pretty difficult, you
know?

Going for everything will be pretty difficult, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm set on trying though! No matter how hard it
gets, I'll prepare myself for the worst!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whichever dream I chase, I'll do it with all my
muscles—and heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's prepared for anything that may come, so I
can see her making progress in any direction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Revolutionize them? Now that's a tough one. Not
just train my muscles, but totally reinvent them...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Right, I've always focused on strengthening my
muscles, but I need to do more...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay, I got it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Let's play basketball! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll try moving my body differently than usual. Do
some pivots, work on my layups... That should get
things off to a good start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan moves around lightly on her feet. It
seems she's getting a lot of ideas from playing
basketball.
